case_title: SAN FRANCISCO COMPREHENSIVE SHUTTLE TOURS VS. CHRISTOPHER FOGG

docket_entries.description: VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY DEFENDANT FOGG, CHRISTOPHER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-31-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANTS MOTION CHALLENGING VENUE IS DENIED. CASE TO BE RE-SET FOR TRIAL ON 1/31/13 AT 8:30AM," PER JUDGE MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN BILELLO. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMPREHENSIVE  SHUTTLE TOURS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2013 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR TRIAL TO MAR-01-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
